timeline_nodes.scene_summary: On a moonlit patio, Yuri shares Russian food and vodka with John, symbolizing work, family, and love, culminating in a harmonized song by veterans and a joyful Polaroid moment with Nadia and Alexei.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Guitar-playing veteran in a communal meal and song
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Plays guitar, sings a love song, and is disclosed as an Afghanistan veteran during group harmonization
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Poses for a Polaroid with John and Nadia after harmonizing
evidence_quotes: Alexei tinkles beautifully on his guitar.
Alexei begins softly singing a song.
YURI This is a love song, a soldier's song to his beloved -- Alexei, he's Afghanstya, a veteran of Afghanistan. He saw terrible things.

relation_updates: Bonds with Yuri and Nadia through harmonized song
Poses for photo with John and Nadia, with Nadia's arm around him
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Shown as a musical veteran contributing to a shared singing and photo moment

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John joins Alexei, Nadia, and Yuri; uneasy as Alexei playfully holds a knife above Nadia's stomach, then questions marks on her midriff in Russian, leaving John anxious and confused.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Companion to Nadia who alternates between playful intimacy and intimidating behavior.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei shows intimacy with Nadia by removing a twig from her hair and feeding her, then holds a knife above her stomach and questions marks on her midriff.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: John is anxious and confused; the group interaction continues.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The meaning of the marks on Nadia's midriff and Alexei's intent in questioning them.
evidence_quotes: He removes a small twig from her hair and flattens it under his big hand.
Alexei feeds a piece to Nadia with a big hunting knife.
Alexei takes the knife he has just finished cleaning and holds the cold wide blade flat above Nadia's bare stomach.
Alexei notices marks on Nadia's midriff. He asks her about them in Russian.

relation_updates: Relationship with Nadia becomes complex with closeness and threat
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Alexei demonstrates affection through close gestures but introduces menace with a knife and personal inquiries.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alexei, holding Nadia hostage with a boiling kettle and knife, demands all of John's bank money; John panics as Alexei pours hot water on Nadia, escalating the terror.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Hostage-taker and extortionist
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei ties Nadia to a chair, gags her, holds a knife to her throat, and pours boiling water on her to demand all of John's bank money.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To obtain all money from John's bank account.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alexei has injured Nadia with boiling water and is holding her hostage with a knife, demanding John's bank money.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether John will comply with the demand to give all his bank money.
evidence_quotes: Alexei pulls a gag tight around her mouth and holds the knife to her throat.
Alexei takes the kettle and holds it over Nadia's head.
Alexei doesn't need the translation he tilts the kettle, and a small amount of boiling water trickles onto Nadia's hair.

relation_updates: Threatens and harms Nadia
Cooperates with Yuri for translation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Alexei uses violence and threats to extort money.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alexei discovers something shocking in a case, shares a passionate moment with Nadia, who frees herself; John, distraught, drives while dying as Yuri holds a knife to him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Discoverer of case contents and romantic partner to Nadia
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei opens a case, shows its contents to Nadia, and kisses her after lowering her gag.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Nadia has freed herself, and Alexei and Nadia are kissing and making out passionately.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The shocking contents of the case and John's deteriorating condition.
evidence_quotes: Alexei opens one of the cases and looks inside.
He shows what is in the case to Nadia.
Alexei gently lowers the gag and kisses her on the mouth.

relation_updates: Romantic involvement with Nadia
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Initiates intimacy with Nadia after discovery, with her actively participating.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Nadia reveals she's pregnant; Alexei is shocked, questions their ability to handle a baby, then silently processes the news while she holds him, rubbing her wrists behind his back.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confronts Nadia about wrist marks and learns of her pregnancy
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei agrees to stop drugs, questions Nadia about wrist marks, and reacts with shock to pregnancy news
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To stop using drugs and respond to the pregnancy
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alexei is shocked and silent, processing the pregnancy news while Nadia holds him
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The cause of Nadia's wrist marks and how they will manage a baby
evidence_quotes: We'll stop then.
He takes her hand, and notices the tie marks on her wrists.
Now he seems shocked.
A baby? What are we supposed to do with a baby?

relation_updates: Alexei and Nadia decide to stop drugs together
Alexei's trust in Nadia is questioned by the wrist marks
Pregnancy revelation changes their relationship dynamics
status_updates: Alexei is now expecting a child
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Alexei dealing with trust concerns and impending fatherhood

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John observes Alexei approaching Nadia, who reacts with shock; Alexei coaxes her, touches her knee, takes her arm, and leads her away, leaving John horrified as Yuri watches nearby.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Approaches and leads Nadia away from the airport.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei approaches Nadia, who reacts with shock; she pulls her arm away, but he crouches, coaxes her by touching her knee, and takes her arm to lead her away.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To lead Nadia away from the airport.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alexei has led Nadia away from the airport.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Nadia's resistance and Alexei's intentions for taking her.
evidence_quotes: We spy someone standing about twenty feet behind her. It is Alexei.
Nadia pulls her arm away.
Alexei crouches down in front of her and puts a hand on her knee, coaxing her.
Alexei takes her by the arm and leads her away.

relation_updates: Exerts coercive control over Nadia
status_updates: Physically escorts Nadia away from a public space
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Persistent in approaching Nadia despite her resistance, and controlling in physically leading her away.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alexei professes love and commitment to Nadia, claiming confusion but not abandonment, as she remains distant by the window.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Father verbally reassuring daughter
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei tells Nadia he loves her, would not leave his child, and says his past behavior was due to confusion.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To reassure Nadia of his love and commitment to remain in her life.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alexei has delivered his reassurance, but Nadia remains distant, looking at the floor.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Nadia will accept or respond to his reassurance.
evidence_quotes: ALEXEI I love you. I don't need to tell you that.
ALEXEI I wouldn't leave my child would I? You know that. I was confused. That's all.

relation_updates: Reaffirms parent-child bond with Nadia
Expresses commitment to remain in her life
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Uses direct verbal appeal to address past confusion and reaffirm bond.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alexei reflects on his journey to self-clarity, stating he now knows what he wants and is happy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Alexei stating his achieved clarity and happiness
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei declares he now knows what he wants and expresses happiness
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alexei is happy and has clarity on what he wants
evidence_quotes: Now I know.
I'm happy.

status_updates: Internal state shift from confusion to clarity and happiness
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Happiness and clarity as directly stated

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alexei confronts Nadia and John; after tension escalates, John attacks Alexei with a guitar as Alexei grabs Nadia's knife, leaving all in chaos.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Ex-lover confronting rival and former partner
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei's attempt to win back Nadia is rejected; she threatens him with a knife, and John attacks him with a guitar, resulting in a chaotic physical fight.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To reassert his relationship with Nadia and remove John from the suite.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Injured after being hit with a guitar, with the confrontation in disarray.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The violent conflict and Nadia's rejection remain unsettled.
evidence_quotes: ALEXEI You still love me? Eh? Of course you do. Come here. Yuri won't be here for a while. Come on babe.
Alexei walks calmly towards John and throws a punch.
NADIA I'll kill you if you try.
John brains him with one of the guitars. It emits a fruity final chord.

relation_updates: Relationship with Nadia becomes openly hostile (she threatens to kill him)
Adversarial relationship with John escalates to physical violence
status_updates: Physically assaulted by John (punched, kicked, hit with guitar)
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Physically defeated and emotionally rejected.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Nadia bites Alexei, leaving her lips bloody; John takes the money and they leave, with Nadia giving Alexei a final look before departing.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Assaulted captive
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Nadia bites Alexei on the cheek, causing a bleeding gash, and John takes his passport; Alexei watches Nadia.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mouth taped, cheek injured and bleeding, passport taken.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Alexei's physical state and response to the assault.
evidence_quotes: She carefully places tape across his mouth.
She's bitten him on the cheek.
A single streak of blood runs from the gash.
He takes Alexei's passport from his pocket

relation_updates: Nadia bites Alexei, showing aggression
Alexei watches Nadia intently
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Injured and observant captive.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Alexei starts as a communal musician and Afghanistan veteran, bonding with John, Nadia, and Yuri. His relationship with Nadia shifts through intimacy, threat, extortion, romance, and pregnancy revelations, involving violence and control. After reconciliation attempts and a declaration of self-clarity, he faces violent rejection and ends injured and captive.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John reflects on regrets and societal judgment while a burst of crows precedes a blackout, leading to overlapping video and audio of Russian women advertising online.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Individual submitting personal details to an online matchmaking service
timeline_nodes.salient_development: John reflects on past regrets and societal judgment, then types his name and AMEX number into his PC and hits SEND.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To connect with a partner through the online submission.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: After hitting SEND, a burst of black crows occurs, followed by a blackout and overlapping video advertisements of Russian women.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The outcome of his online submission and potential relationship.
evidence_quotes: John's fingers in close-up, type JOHN BUCKINGHAM, and his AMEX number into his PC.
He hits SEND.

status_updates: Initiated search for a partner via online submission.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A person justifying his online search as a brave and reasonable move.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John meets Nadia at the airport; they exchange brief words amid loud announcements and awkward silence before noting her luggage.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: John meets his mail-order bride, Nadia, at the airport.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: John first mistakes another passenger for Nadia, then meets Nadia herself, exchanging a brief, awkward greeting amid airport noise.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: John and Nadia are together at the arrivals gate, standing in silence after a brief exchange.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Awkward silence and difficulty communicating due to loud announcements.
evidence_quotes: John stands among the chauffeurs and cab drivers
We follow one young woman long enough to think this must be her, but it's a false alarm
JOHN Nadia? She nods.

relation_updates: Established initial contact with Nadia.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Anxious while waiting and uncertain during the greeting.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John nervously converses with Nadia, who struggles with his speech pace; she confirms understanding but later vomits from the moving car, causing John to swerve onto the hard shoulder amid honking.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Driver transporting Nadia home
timeline_nodes.salient_development: John's nervous conversation and communication issues with Nadia lead to her vomiting from the moving car, causing him to swerve and stop on the hard shoulder.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Transport Nadia safely to his home.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Car stranded on the motorway hard shoulder after emergency stop.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to resume the journey and establish clear communication.
evidence_quotes: I'm having a problem with ants. I uh... It's the warmer weather. I can't seem to find the nest.
Are you a giraffe? NADIA Yes.
Suddenly she winds the window down and vomits out of the speeding car.
John panics and swerves onto the hard shoulder amidst loud horn blasts.

relation_updates: First interaction is strained and awkward.
Communication barrier causes mutual confusion.
status_updates: Car stranded on motorway hard shoulder.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Nervous and awkward, with plans disrupted by car trouble and vomiting incident.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Nadia unzips John's fly, presses his hand on her, and he moans; after he ejaculates, she leaves, and he is left breathless, angry, and buttoning his trousers.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Subject of a forced sexual advance
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Nadia forces sexual contact on John, leading to his ejaculation and her departure, leaving him gasping and angry.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alone in the bedroom, buttoning his trousers, gasping and angry.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Conflict with Nadia after the forced encounter.
evidence_quotes: she's placed her hand across his mouth.
Her free hand lowers to press against him, and unzip his fly.
He lets out a moan.
Nadia turns and walks out, leaving John marooned, gasping in and blowing out, angry almost, buttoning his trousers.

relation_updates: Sexual encounter with Nadia.
Left distressed and angry by Nadia.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A victim of coercion, experiencing anger and loss of agency.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John discovers old photos and binoculars, finds his picture on the mantelpiece, and panics when the shower stops, quickly hiding the items.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Discoverer of his own surveillance photo
timeline_nodes.salient_development: John finds his picture cut from a brochure on Nadia's mantelpiece, indicating she had prior interest in him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Panicked, he hides the items he examined.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Nadia's motives for having his picture.
evidence_quotes: On the mantelpiece, in a silver frame, is his picture, cut from the brochure.
In a panic he replaces the picture, the photographs, the gun lighter, the brochure, and the binoculars.

relation_updates: Discovers Nadia has his picture, indicating hidden motives.
status_updates: Becomes aware of being targeted or watched.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Fearful and suspicious upon realizing he was being watched.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alexei, holding Nadia hostage with a boiling kettle and knife, demands all of John's bank money; John panics as Alexei pours hot water on Nadia, escalating the terror.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Hostage victim forced to comply
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Alexei pours boiling water on Nadia and threatens her with a knife, demanding all of John's bank money; John capitulates under duress.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To stop the torture and secure Nadia's safety by agreeing to Alexei's financial demand.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Agrees to give Alexei all the money from his bank.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether John can access and transfer the bank funds, and whether Alexei will release Nadia.
evidence_quotes: He wants the money from your bank
I'll fuckin' give it to him!
John tries to reach across to her but Alexei draws the knife and holds it to his face.

relation_updates: Hostile dynamic with Alexei escalates to direct violence and coercion.
status_updates: Forced into compliance under life-threatening duress.
Committed to accessing and giving up his bank funds.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A terrified man forced to capitulate under direct violence.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John sees his photo among Nadia's other partners, breaks down in tears as Yuri removes her ring from his finger, telling him not to feel too bad.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Captive forced to view photos of Nadia's other partners.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: John sees photos of Nadia with other men, realizes he was duped, cries, and Yuri removes the engagement ring.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Still tied to the bidet, gagged, and without the engagement ring, emotionally distressed.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: John remains captive and emotionally affected by the betrayal.
evidence_quotes: At the other end of the bathroom, tied to the bidet, gagged, is John.
John studies the faces of his fellow dupes and at last comes to his own picture. Despite himself tears come to his eyes.
Yuri takes John's left hand and pulls off Nadia's ring. He puts it in his pocket.

relation_updates: John realizes Nadia's deception.
Yuri removes Nadia's ring from John.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A captive man learning of Nadia's multiple deceptions.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John and Nadia share a tense moment at the airport; she whispers in Russian, urging him to try, then takes money from the guitar case, telling him to hurry while she waits.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Accomplice parting with Nadia at the airport
timeline_nodes.salient_development: John and Nadia say goodbye at the airport gate; Nadia takes money from a guitar case and tells John to hurry.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To part ways with Nadia and board the flight to Moscow
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: John has the guitar cases and is preparing to depart; Nadia has taken some money and remains at the gate

She leans forward and kisses him.
NADIA Hurry. I'll wait for you here.
JOHN Right.

relation_updates: Operational partnership with Nadia confirmed.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An accomplice in the heist, now at the airport with Nadia

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John and Nadia, who reveals her name as Sophia, walk silently to boarding doors, exchange names, and enter together as jet engines roar.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Man boarding a flight with the woman who deceived him
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Nadia reveals her real name is Sophia, and they walk through the boarding doors together
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: On board the plane with Sophia
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What happens after boarding

John and Sophia walk through, and disappear.
They walk side by side without speaking.

relation_updates: Learns Nadia's real name is Sophia.
Partners with Sophia for the next phase.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A man who silently boards with Sophia after she reveals her name

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: John Buckingham, a lonely bank clerk, initiates an online search for a Russian wife, leading to Nadia's arrival. Their relationship is strained by cultural barriers, manipulation, and escalating violence, culminating in a forced bank robbery. After a chaotic escape and a fraught journey, John and Nadia (now revealed as Sophia) board a flight to Moscow together, their future uncertain.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.salient_development: Nadia presents a gold ring to John, persists through his refusal by placing it on his finger, and he accepts it reluctantly.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Nadia arrives in England and forms a turbulent relationship with John, marked by domestic intimacy and escalating conflicts. Her past with Alexei resurfaces, revealing violence, pregnancy, and a false identity. After a series of confrontations and revelations, she escapes with John, parts ways, and is later revealed to be Sophia, boarding a plane with him.
